FATEASPECTS.Title: Fate Aspects
FATEASPECTS.SceneHint: Aspects are bound to the active scene

FATEASPECTS.DragText: Drag onto the scene as a text label

FATEASPECTS.ConfirmDeleteContent: Delete aspect "{name}" and everything placed for it on the scene?
FATEASPECTS.Notify.EmptyName: The aspect name cannot be empty!
FATEASPECTS.Notify.NoSelection: Select an object on the scene first!
FATEASPECTS.Notify.SelectionNoText: The selected object has no text or name!
FATEASPECTS.Notify.NoLegacy: No new aspects found in the macro storage.
FATEASPECTS.Notify.Imported: Imported {count} aspect(s) from the macro storage!
FATEASPECTS.Keys.TargetHint: Works on the hovered or selected aspect token/label
FATEASPECTS.Settings.TokenImage.Name: Aspect token image
FATEASPECTS.Settings.TokenImage.Hint: Image used when an aspect is placed on the scene as a token.
FATEASPECTS.Settings.FontSize.Name: Text label font size
FATEASPECTS.Settings.FontFamily.Name: Text label font family
FATEASPECTS.Settings.TextColor.Name: Text label color
FATEASPECTS.Settings.SceneControl.Name: Show button in scene controls
FATEASPECTS.Settings.SceneControl.Hint: Adds a tracker button to the token controls toolbar on the left.
